title: Notification No.80/2015-CUS(NT), dated 18.08.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 80/ 2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 18th August, 2015 S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Nhava Sheva-II), Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Tal, Uran Dist. Raigad, Maharashtra to act as common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties in respect of adjudication of the show cause notices specified in column (3) of the table below issued by the Commissioner of Customs or Principal Commissioner of Customs specified in column (4) in case of parties specified in column (2) of the said Table, respectively, namely:- Table F.No. 437/24/2015- Cus IV] (Anurag Sehgal) Under Secretary to the Government of India Sl. No. Names of Parties Show Cause Notice Number. and date Issuing Authority (1) (2) (3) (4) 1. M/s. LLOYD Electric &Engineering. Ltd., Plot No.-2, Kalkaji Industrial Area, New Delhi F.No.SD/INT/NSPU/28/2014 R & I/9602, dated 12th May, 2015 Principal Commissioner of Customs ICD- Import, Tughlakabad, New Delhi 2. M/s. LEEL, Plot No.-2, Kalkaji Industrial Area, New Delhi F.No.S.Misc.50/2015-GR-5A SD/INT/NSPU/28/2014-R & I, dated 5th May,2015 Commissioner of Customs (Chennai- II) Custom House, Chennai 3. M/s. LLOYD Electric & Engineering. Ltd., Plot No.-2, Kalkaji Industrial Area, New Delhi F.No.VIII(30)Adj.Cus/Lloyd/08/2015, dated 13th May,2015 Commissioner of Customs, Noida Customs Commissionerate 4. M/s. LEEL, Plot No.-2, Kalkaji Industrial Area, New Delhi and others F.No.SD/INT/NSPU/28/2014 R & I, dated 24th April, 2015 Commissioner of Customs (P), Mumbai, Zone-III 5. M/s. LEEL, Plot No.-2, Kalkaji Industrial Area, New Delhi and others F.No.SD/INT/NSPU/28/2014 R & I, dated 24th April, 2015 Commissioner of Customs (P), Mumbai, Zone-III -- 1 of 1 --
